# returns

```go
import "github.com/shaobaobaoer/solarsage-mcp/pkg/returns"
```

Package returns calculates solar and lunar return charts. A return chart is cast for the moment a transiting body returns to its exact natal longitude.

CalcSolarReturn and CalcLunarReturn compute single returns, while CalcSolarReturnSeries and CalcLunarReturnSeries produce consecutive return charts for multi\-year analysis. CalcPlanetReturn supports arbitrary bodies.

## Index

  - [func CalcLunarReturn\(input ReturnInput\) \(\*ReturnChart, error\)](<#CalcLunarReturn>)
  - [func CalcLunarReturnSeries\(input ReturnInput, count int\) \(\[\]\*ReturnChart, error\)](<#CalcLunarReturnSeries>)
  - [func CalcPlanetReturn\(input ReturnInput, planet models.PlanetID\) \(\*ReturnChart, error\)](<#CalcPlanetReturn>)
  - [func CalcSolarReturn\(input ReturnInput\) \(\*ReturnChart, error\)](<#CalcSolarReturn>)

<a name="ReturnChart"></a>
## type [ReturnChart](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/returns/returns.go#L15-L24>)

ReturnChart holds the return chart data along with return\-specific metadata

```go
type ReturnChart struct {
    ReturnJD     float64           `json:"return_jd"`
    ReturnType   string            `json:"return_type"` // "solar" or "lunar"
    NatalJD      float64           `json:"natal_jd"`
    Age          float64           `json:"age"`
    Chart        *models.ChartInfo `json:"chart"`
    PlanetLon    float64           `json:"planet_longitude"`
    NatalLon     float64           `json:"natal_longitude"`
    IsRetrograde bool              `json:"is_retrograde,omitempty"`
}
```

<a name="CalcLunarReturn"></a>
### func [CalcLunarReturn](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/returns/returns.go#L45>)

```go
func CalcLunarReturn(input ReturnInput) (*ReturnChart, error)
```

CalcLunarReturn finds the exact moment the Moon returns to its natal longitude after SearchJD, and calculates a full chart for that moment.

<a name="CalcLunarReturnSeries"></a>
### func [CalcLunarReturnSeries](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/returns/returns.go#L61>)

```go
func CalcLunarReturnSeries(input ReturnInput, count int) ([]*ReturnChart, error)
```

CalcLunarReturnSeries calculates multiple consecutive lunar returns

<a name="CalcPlanetReturn"></a>
### func [CalcPlanetReturn](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/returns/returns.go#L51>)

```go
func CalcPlanetReturn(input ReturnInput, planet models.PlanetID) (*ReturnChart, error)
```

CalcPlanetReturn finds the exact moment a planet returns to its natal longitude. Works for any non\-retrograding period. For outer planets, handles retrograde passes.

<a name="CalcSolarReturn"></a>
### func [CalcSolarReturn](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/returns/returns.go#L39>)

```go
func CalcSolarReturn(input ReturnInput) (*ReturnChart, error)
```

CalcSolarReturn finds the exact moment the Sun returns to its natal longitude after SearchJD, and calculates a full chart for that moment.

func CalcSolarReturnSeries(input ReturnInput, count int) ([]*ReturnChart, error)

CalcSolarReturnSeries calculates multiple consecutive solar returns

<a name="ReturnInput"></a>
## type [ReturnInput](<https://github.com/shaobaobaoer/SolarSage/blob/main/pkg/returns/returns.go#L27-L35>)

ReturnInput configures a return chart calculation

```go
type ReturnInput struct {
    NatalJD     float64
    NatalLat    float64
    NatalLon    float64
    SearchJD    float64 // Start searching from this JD
    Planets     []models.PlanetID
    OrbConfig   models.OrbConfig
    HouseSystem models.HouseSystem
}
```
